title: Metals gain as China looks to boost stimulus measures
section_path: Metals gain as China looks to boost stimulus measures
section_path_text: Metals gain as China looks to boost stimulus measures
summary:
Main
Supply side issues were the focus for energy and metals markets. The prospect of stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment across sectors. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-14 140651.png | assets/2024-05-14_1bbo0t8vvlasaj6t8x0inogzg7domp_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d5549b83968e.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil edged higher on signs of tightening supplies.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Supply side issues were the focus for energy and metals markets. The prospect of stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment across sectors.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil edged higher on signs of tightening supplies. Iraq's oil minister, Hayyan Abdul Ghani, said the country would stick to whatever OPEC decides at its upcoming meeting.
